changelog: Region required for Images/Flavors loading — region selector mandatory, region column in tables
Flavors: flavor group fetched from /flavor-groups and shown in table + used as prefix in config group
Security Groups: project + region selectors; project dropdown from saved projects + manual input fallback
Storage Policies: region required by API — region selector added to Volume Types tab
Config Group: Region added as first option; Server Size uses grouped display names (Group: FlavourName)
Config Group listing: only shows groups linked to cloudpe_cmp products
Nameserver fix: convert ns prefix inputs to type=hidden (most reliable form submission approach)
